mapper.insert: INSERT INTO career_goal (user_id, target_job, target_period, priority_skill, preferred_company_type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetJob}, #{targetPeriod}, #{prioritySkill}, #{preferredCompanyType}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE target_job=VALUES(target_job), target_period=VALUES(target_period), priority_skill=VALUES(priority_skill), preferred_company_type=VALUES(preferred_company_type)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM learning_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY status = 'ACTIVE' DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM learning_plan WHERE id = #{planId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_plan (user_id, title, target_skill, start_date, end_date, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{targetSkill}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM learning_plan_task WHERE learning_plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY done, sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_plan_task (learning_plan_id, task, done, sort_order) VALUES (#{learningPlanId}, #{task}, #{done}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_plan_task task INNER JOIN learning_plan plan ON plan.id = task.learning_plan_id SET task.done = #{done}, task.completed_at = IF(#{done}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL) WHERE task.id = #{taskId} AND task.learning_plan_id = #{planId} AND plan.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM learning_plan_task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND learning_plan_id = #{planId}
